name: Axisflying AF2207.5 FPV Motor - 1960KV
description: The AxisFlying AF2207.5 FPV Motor delivers strong, efficient power and crisp throttle response for freestyle, bando, and racing builds. Its precision-balanced design and quality bearings help reduce vibration and improve overall flight smoothness.

name: VCI Hobby ARES 2808 Motor - 1350KV
description: The VCI Hobby ARES 2808 1350KV Motor delivers high-rpm performance and smooth throttle response for your next build.

name: VCI Hobby Spark 2406 Motor - 1550KV
description: The VCI Hobby 1406 1550KV Motor delivers high-rpm performance and smooth throttle response for your next build.

name: VCI Hobby Yuki Savage 2207 Motor - 2120KV
description: The VCI Hobby Yuki Savage 2207 Motor has been battle-tested by the only pilot who could put a motor with that name under real pressure: Yuki Hashimoto himself.

name: BrotherHobby Avenger 2810 Motor - 1350KV
description: The BrotherHobby Avenger 2810 Motor - 1350KV is your next big step into cinematic FPV!

name: iFlight XING2 2207 Unibell Motor - 2050KV
description: The iFlight XING2 2207 Motor is built for smooth, reliable FPV performance in a lightweight package.

name: Lumenier 2307 JohnnyFPV V3 Pro Cinematic Motor
description: Introducing the Lumenier 2307 JohnnyFPV V3 Motor, designed for high-performance cinematography, FPV drone racing, and freestyle drone flying.

name: iFlight XING2 2205 FPV Motor - 2300KV (Unibell)
description: The iFlight XING2 2205 Motor (Unibell) is built for smooth, reliable FPV performance in a lightweight package. Featuring a high-strength steel shaft, precision Japanese NSK bearings, and N52H curved magnets, it delivers efficiency, durability, and responsive power for freestyle and racing drones.

name: Lumenier 2807 JohnnyFPV V3 Pro Cinematic Motor
description: Introducing the Lumenier 2807 JohnnyFPV V3 Motor, designed for high-performance cinematography, FPV drone racing, and long-range drone flying.

name: BrotherHobby LPD 2306.5 2000KV/2450KV/2650KV Motor
description: The BrotherHobby LPD 2306.5 Motor is your next big step in FPV Racing! The LPD  is a high-quality motor made with Japanese NMB bearings for smooth, free, and quiet flying.

name: Brotherhobby Avenger V3 2812 900Kv 1115Kv Motor Cw
description: The Brotherhobby Avenger V3 2207.5 Motor is your next big step in FPV Racing! The Avenger V3 is a high-quality motor made with Japanese NMB bearings for smooth, free, and quiet flying. Can be used on an 8"-10" quad!

name: EMAX Pro Series 2808 Motor - 1350KV/1500KV/1900KV
description: Introducing the EMAX Pro Series Heavy Lift FPV Drone Motors.

name: EMAX Pro Series 2812 Motor - 930KV/1100KV
description: Introducing the EMAX Pro Series Heavy Lift FPV Drone Motors.

name: BrotherHobby Special Edition V4 32.5-12 Motor (CW) - 580KV/950KV
description: The BrotherHobby Special Edition V4 32.5-12 motor is a great motor for larger-sized drones using larger props that need insane torque and power. Perfect for X-class drones and bigger builds!

name: EMAX RSIII 2306 Race Motor - 1800KV/2100KV/2500KV
description: Achieve unparalleled drone performance with the EMAX RSIII 2306 Motors. These motors are engineered for precision and power and feature cutting-edge technology to elevate your FPV experience.

name: BrotherHobby GOM 2207.5 Motor - 1750KV/1920KV/2500KV
description: The BrotherHobby GOM 2207.5 Motor is your next big step in FPV Racing!

name: RCINPOWER GTS V4 2207 Motor - 1960KV/2040KV
description: The RCINPOWER GTS V4 2207 Motor is designed with a lightweight base and a one-piece bell, these motors offer exceptional durability and optimized performance.

name: RCINPOWER SmooX 2806 Plus Motor - 1350KV/1750KV
description: Introducing the RCINPOWER SmooX 2806 Plus Motor, a compact and powerful motor designed for FPV enthusiasts.

name: Axisflying C224 2204.5 Motor - 1900KV/3500KV
description: The Axisflying C224 2204.5 Motor is specially designed for professional cinematic FPV drones.

name: AxisFlying C287 2807.5 Motor - 1350KV/1750KV
description: The AxisFlying C287 2807.5 Motor is specially designed for professional cinematic FPV drones.

name: AxisFlying C246 2406 Motor - 1650KV/1850KV/2050KV
description: The AxisFlying C246 2406 Motor is specially designed for professional cinematic FPV drones.

name: Lumenier ZIP V2 2305 Cinematic Motor w/ M3 Shaft - 1800KV/2400KV/3200KV
description: The Lumenier ZIP V2 is a premium, high-performance 2305 Brushless drone motor featuring a lightweight M3 shaft with an additional aluminum spacer that goes from M3 to M5 for universal propeller mounting. Just screw this spacer to the hub of the motor and then use your regular M5 propeller.

name: iFlight XING2 2506 Motor - 1350KV/1650KV/1850KV
description: The XING2 2506 Motors come from the XING series NextGen motors and have become a new standard on the market!

name: T-Motor VELOX V3008 Cinematic Motor - 1155KV/1350KV/1500KV
description: The T-Motor VELOX V3008 Motor continues the lineage of great FPV racing motors by T-Motor! The V3008 is great for 4-8" drones providing cinematic power for all of your extreme flights.

name: AxisFlying AF 3010 Cinematic Motor - 1010KV/1210KV
description: The AxisFlying AF 3010 Cinematic Motor is specially designed for X8 professional cinematic FPV drones. The AxisFlying AF 3010 motor features high power, high efficiency, high torque output, and a waterproof bearing placement design.

name: TBS Grinder V4 2207 Motor - 1750KV
description: The TBS Grinder V4 Motor features a 2207 Stator and 1750KV.

name: XILO Stealth 2207 Motor - 1800KV/2450KV
description: The XILO Stealth 2207 Motor is a high-performance all-black mini motor for FPV drones. Designed for 5-6" props on a range of 4s-6s setups.

name: iFlight XING2 3110 Cinelifter Motor - 900KV/1250KV/1600KV
description: The iFlight XING2 3110 is powerful Cinelifter motor with three KV's options available: 900KV, 1250KV, or 1600KV.

name: DYS SunFun 2306 Motor - 1750KV/1900KV/2500KV
description: The DYS SunFun 2306 Motor has been designed and built specifically for FPV Racing.

name: T-Motor PACER V3 P2306 Powerful Freestyle Motor -1750KV/ 1950KV/ 2550KV
description: The T-Motor PACER V3 P2306 Powerful Freestyle Motor has become one of the most popular motors in the market. T-Motor has updated and upgraded their Pacer motor to V3!

name: Foxeer Datura 2207.5 FPV Motor
description: The Foxeer Datura 2207.5 FPV Motor is one of Foxeer's new line of motors! This is an ultralight motor with semi-hollow titanium shaft that reduces weight while strengthening the motor.

name: Diatone Mamba Toka 2203.5 Motor - 1650KV/2200KV/2650KV/3300KV
description: The Mamba Toka 2203.5 Motor is part of a new series of motors by Diatone that is best suited for CineWhoops, like the Diatone MX-C Taycan or any 3"-4" builds! Choose between four KVs to best fit your FPV needs: 1650KV, 2200KV, 2650KV, or 3300KV.

name: BrotherHobby Avenger 2808 Motor - 1350KV/1500KV/1900KV
description: The BrotherHobby Avenger 2808 Motor is your next big step in FPV Racing! The Avenger 2808 is a high-quality motor made with Japanese NMB bearings for smooth, and free-flying.

name: BrotherHobby Avenger 3120 Motor - 500KV/700KV
description: The BrotherHobby Avenger 31230 Motor is a great motor for larger-sized drones using larger props that need insane torque and power. Perfect for X-Class drones and bigger builds!

name: Brotherhobby Vs 2207 Motor Cw 1720Kv 2400Kv 2700Kv
description: The BrotherHobby VS 2207 Motor comes in an anti-skid design and is suitable for any 5" quad! This motor is durable, lightweight, and has excellent performance.

name: BrotherHobby Avenger 3008 Motor - 1150KV/1300KV/1500KV/1900KV
description: The BrotherHobby Avenger 3800 Motor is your next big step into cinematic FPV! The Avenger 3800 is a high-quality motor made with Japanese NMB bearings for smooth, and free-flying.

name: BrotherHobby Avenger 2806.5 Motor -  870KV/1300KV/1460KV/1700KV
description: BrotherHobby Avenger 2806.5 Motor for long-range FPV. Perfect for your 6", 7" and 8" quads!

name: BrotherHobby Avenger 2816 Motor - 620KV/750KV/810KV/1050KV
description: The BrotherHobby Avenger 2816 Motor is your next big step in FPV Racing! The Avenger 2816 is a high-quality motor made with Japanese NMB bearings for smooth, and free-flying.

name: BrotherHobby Avenger 2810 Motor - 1180KV/1500KV
description: The BrotherHobby Avenger 2810 Motor is your next big step in FPV Racing! The Avenger 2810 is a high-quality motor made with Japanese NMB bearings for smooth, and free-flying.

name: iFlight XING-E Pro 2207 Motor (1pc) - 1800KV/2450KV/2750KV
description: The XING-E Pro 2207 Motor by iFlight is a 2207 sized motor that features a High-strength 5mm prop shaft shaft, Single strand windings for performance, an M3 shaft screw, and larger 9x4x4mm NSK bearings.

name: Lumenier ZIP V2 2807 Cinematic Motor - 1300KV/1700KV/1950KV
description: The Lumenier ZIP motor line continues to grow with the addition of the ZIP 2807 Motor. With two different KV options to choose from, you'll have a ZIP to match every setup.

name: iFlight XING2 2405 Motor (Unibell) - 1800KV/1950KV
description: iFlight is finally ready to announce its predecessor to the XING motor, the XING2! These smooth, reliable, and powerful XING motors have been upgraded with an even higher standard of performance and manufacturing. The XING2 motors offer a faster response to translate your PID loop quicker and get that locked-in feeling you have always been looking for!

name: iFlight XING2 3106 1200KV/1500KV Motor (Unibell)
description: iFlight is finally ready to announce its predecessor to the XING motor, the XING2! These smooth, reliable, and powerful XING motors have been upgraded with an even higher standard of performance and manufacturing. The XING2 motors offer a faster response to translate your PID loop quicker and get that locked-in feeling you have always been looking for!

name: iFlight XING2 2306 1755KV/2555KV Motor
description: iFlight is finally ready to announce its predecessor to the XING motor, the XING2! These smooth, reliable, and powerful XING motors have been upgraded with an even higher standard of performance and manufacturing. The XING2 motors offer a faster response to translate your PID loop quicker and get that locked-in feeling you have always been looking for!

name: iFlight XING2 2207 Motor - 1855KV/2755KV
description: The successor to the ever-popular XING motors, the XING2 brings new features such as center-slotted N52H curved arc magnets to reduce response time to give you the most locked-in feeling yet.

name: T-Motor VELOX VELOCE V2207.5 V2 Motor - 1750KV/1950KV/2550KV (Royal Blue)
description: Introducing the new V2 VELOX motors by T-Motor. The V2207.5 motors come in a new and sleek design and are made with premium components to give your multirotor visibility and speed in the game! Great for freestyle and racing. Velox series is designed for pilots to challenge themselves constantly, so they can be free while flying! Feel the wind, free yourself, and challenge your limits! Available in 1750KV or 2550KV.

name: Lumenier 2306 JohnnyFPV Cinematic V2 Motor (1750KV/2250KV/2550KV)
description: The V2 2306 Cinematic was engineered to better compliment JohnnyFPV's current flying style - gigantic dives and full-speed acro. Both of these require high power and top-end torque to make high-speed maneuvers without losing momentum.

name: RCINPOWER SmooX 2306 Plus Motor - 1350KV/1880KV/2280KV/2580KV
description: The SmooX 2306 Plus Motor is a powerful new motor by RCINPOWER! Choose a KV option: 1350KV, 1880KV, 2280KV/2580KV.

name: EMAX ECO II Series 2807 Motor (1300KV/1500KV/1700KV)
description: The engineers at EMAX are always seeking ways to design the ultimate motor with brushless technology. In their efforts, they produced the ECO II Series, a new line of brushless motors further improving on the performance and durability while retaining the same affordability.

description: The T-Motor PACER V2 P2306 features a lower throttle to give your freestyle quadcopter a smooth and stable feel. Available in two KV options: 1950KV, 2550KV.

description: The AMAXinno Superleggera 2305.5 A-Bell Motor comes with a special half-hollow shaft and further improved "A-Bell" design, making slipped magnets and dented bells a thing of the past! This motor is smooth, powerful, and extremely durable!

description: The AMAXinno Superleggera 2207 A-Bell Motor comes with a special half-hollow shaft and further improved "A-Bell" design, making slipped magnets and dented bells a thing of the past! This motor is smooth, powerful, and extremely durable!

description: The T-Motor Slatts 2306.3 Motor continues the lineage of great FPV racing motors by T-Motor! Slaats was designed in collaboration with SlattFPV.

name: ELEV8 FPV Cricket 2306.5 Motor - 1750KV
description: The ELEV8_FPV Cricket FPV 2306.5 1750KV Motors are now here! We’re proud to introduce you to this absolutely stunning creation. Designed by Rotor Riot Pilot, Corey Tapp aka "CricketFPV".

name: TBS Grinder V3 2207 Motor - 1750KV
description: The TBS Grinder V3 Freestyle Motor is made for hardcore FPV pilots who misjudge power loops and are a bit too cocky on the sticks. This motor won't burn a hole in your wallet and will keep up with the craziest freestyle pilots.

name: T-Motor PACER V3 P2207 Powerful Freestyle Motor -1750KV/ 1950KV/ 2080KV/ 2550KV

name: Diatone Mamba Toka 2808 Motor - 1100KV
description: The Mamba Toka 2808 Motor is an ideal motor for 7" quads, such as the Diatone Roma F7.

name: T-Motor P2505 1850KV Motor - Pale Rose
description: The T-Motor P2505 1850KV motor is a responsive, smooth, and super lightweight motor that is made of high-quality components like an N54 magnet for better performance and a unique hollow-carved design to bring you smooth flying!

name: T-Motor F90 2806.5 Motor - 1300KV/1500KV/1950KV
description: Get a longer flight time with the T-Motor F90 Motor! This motor is designed for Cinelifter X8 FPV builds or similar style builds meant to carry a heavy camera.

name: TBS Grinder V3 2207 Motor - 2450KV
description: The Grinder V3 Freestyle Motor is made for hardcore FPV pilots who misjudge power loops and are a bit too cocky on the sticks. This motor won't burn a hole in your wallet and will keep up with the craziest freestyle pilots.

name: Lumenier ZIP V2 2407 Motor - 1700KV/2550KV
description: The Lumenier ZIP V2 motor line continues to grow with the addition of the ZIP V2 2407 Motor. With two different KV options to choose from, you'll have a ZIP V2 to match every setup!

name: Ethix Mr Steele Stout Motor V3 - Legacy
description: The Legacy Stout V3 has changed the colorway to an all-new raw tumbled aluminum finish. The V3 Legacy motors offer maximum performance and compatibility without breaking the bank. V3 legacy motors share completely reverse compatibility with Mr Steele V3 motors.

name: iFlight XING 2306 Motor (Unibell) - 2450KV
description: The iFlight XING 2306 (2450KV) is part of a series designed and named by FPV pilot & specialist Patrick Xing. Combining IFlight's high-quality motor production technology with Patrick Xing's technical expertise, a top-of-the-line motor has been produced.

name: Ethix Mr Steele Stout 2306 Motor V4 - 1750KV
description: Introducing the 4th iteration of the Mr. Steele Stout 6S motor! The ETHIX Mr. Steele Stout 2306 Motor is an absolute gem only increasing the weight by a tad over 1g from the previous model while achieving more power, efficiency, and most importantly durability.

name: Ethix Mr Steele Stout Motor V4 - Red Launch Edition
description: Introducing the 4th iteration of the Mr Steele Stout 6S motor. Launch edition limited to 1000pcs created by Ethix.

name: T-Motor BMS Racing Raptor V2 2306.5 Motor - 2000KV
description: The T-Motor BMS Racing Raptor V2 2306.5 Motor was developed in collaboration with Thomas Bitmatta (BMSWEB). The BMS Racing Raptor series by T-Motor was made to the highest standards of FPV racing.

name: DYS SunFun X2203 Motor - 3000KV/3500KV
description: The DYS SunFun X2203 Motor has been designed and built specifically for FPV Racing. The SunFun series are great affordable motors for a basher build or for a beginner who wants to get in the air and learn all of the basics to flying FPV!

name: iFlight XING2 2604 1350KV/1650KV Motor (Unibell)
description: iFlight is finally ready to announce its successor to the XING motor, the XING2! These smooth, reliable, and powerful XING motors have been upgraded with an even higher standard of performance and manufacturing. The XING2 motors offer a faster response to translate your PID loop quicker and get that locked-in feeling you have always been looking for!

name: T-Motor VELOX V2306.5 2550KV Motor
description: Introducing the new VELOX motors by T-Motor. The V2306.5 motors come in a sleek gold or silver bell and are made with premium components to give your quad the edge it deserves.

name: Stan FPV 2604 1690KV Pro Motor (5mm Shaft)
description: Whether you fly freestyle, cinematic, or race, the Stan FPV 2604 1690KV (6S ) Pro Motor is perfect for all types of 5" mini-quads and more! Fly like a bird.

name: iFlight XING 2203.5 1900KV/2700KV Motor - 1.5mm Shaft
description: New toothpick-style motor from iFlight with a 1.5mm shaft instead of the larger 5mm shaft found on the similar 2203.5 XING motor. This version is much lighter than the 5mm shaft version which makes it a much better partner for ultralight builds.

description: Introducing the new V2 VELOX motors by T-Motor. The V2800 motors come in a new and sleek design and are made with premium components to give your multirotor visibility and speed in the game! Great for freestyle and racing. Velox series is designed for pilots to challenge themselves constantly, so they can be free while flying! Feel the wind, free yourself, and challenge your limits! Available in 1750KV,1950KV, or 2450KV.
